title: VLCC AG & Aframax Mediterranean Vessel Count & Market Rates
section_path: VLCC AG & Aframax Mediterranean Vessel Count & Market Rates
section_path_text: VLCC AG & Aframax Mediterranean Vessel Count & Market Rates
summary:
Main
Tanker - Weekly Market Monitor
Snapshot of Crude and Product Freight Rates, Supply-Demand
Week 04, January 24, 2025
Chart of the Week: VLCC AG & Aframax Mediterranean Vessel Count & Market Rates
This week's focus centers on comparing VLCC tanker counts in the Arabian Gulf (AG) with Aframax activity in the Mediterranean, as well as analysing the performance of Baltic rates. Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-01-24 180410.png | assets/2025-01-24_vlcc-ag-amp-aframax-mediterranean-vessel-count-amp-market-rates_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_1aeae24d0f31.png
The fourth week of February brought a downward correction in the sharp rise of VLCC AG-China rates, which had surged following the announcement of U.S. sanctions on Russian crude oil destined for China and other Asian markets.
